parsed_review.summary: CP00-634 (RP20 Data Room & VDR, P06 Permission And Audit Binding tail, Risk A, 10 units RP20.P06.M05.S13-S22) is a clean descriptor-only pack and the production_ready claim is supported. Verified the full chain: pack binding (registry.js:464) == contract projections == manifest plan_binding_snapshot == live plan cursor == next-pack-queue (upstream CP00-633, next CP00-635 / RP20.P06.M06.S01). Coverage resolves to exactly the 10 planned units via P06_PERMISSION_AUDIT_BINDING_TAIL_ROWS (slice(12) of the 20-row M05 list + Cross-tenant/Leak-prevention tests) with deliverable distribution ui:2, claude_review:1, security_audit:3, test:4, matching the prompt baseline, expected_deliverable_counts, and the per-row deliverable_type/title-set mapping in service.js. The 1.4MB contract's cp634_pack_binding/cp634_requirements/cp634_no_write_attestation/descriptor are deep-equal-bound to the package code in both scripts/validate-rp20-data-room-vdr-core-contract.mjs:524-527 and packages/data-room/test/model.test.js:1460-1463; the freezeCp634Result chain accounts for accumulated attestation booleans. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are exhaustive and enforced by validateDataRoomVdrCoreCp634P06PermissionAuditBindingTailDescriptor (validators.js:3555-3600): synthetic_only, no runtime dispatch for data-room/VDR/RFI/CP/closing-binder/access-analytics, no object-storage read/write, no permission-decision or audit writes, no Hermes runtime receipt, and all executes_p06_* tail flags false. Authority boundary holds: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true (runtime opens at CP00-635); Hermes is used only for the deterministic descriptor evidence packet (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false). CP178+ hardening is intact: forbidden_review_evidence/invalid_review_blockers present, and the readiness auth preflight passed with non-empty valid JSON (1228 bytes, exit 0). command-evidence.json records all required validators plus npm test and git diff --check at exit 0. The pack-level adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, and claude-review-result.json are in the expected PENDING pre-review state; this read-only review is the gate that allows them and the descriptor-scoped production_ready flag to be finalized. Note: production_ready here is descriptor-scoped (runtime_ready remains false), consistent with the established model and not a weakening of any gate. No P0-P3 findings.
